creator: kozos@kozos.jp
text:
Created attachment 244782
shar archive

> - when I try to build the port with option NOGRAPHIC, it still tries to link
   against SDL.  Specifically, "make stage-qa" reports:

>   despite SDL2 being turned off supposedly.  This also applies when SDL1 is
>   selected as the backend.

> - SDL1 is very old and subsumed by SDL2.  While it is ok to have both, it may
   be enough to only have support for SDL2.

Sorry, this is a mistake of the word in Makefile.
It was taken measures.
Both SDL1 and SDL2 are not ok at the same time.

(USE_GRAPHIC_SDL1/USE_GRAPHIC_SDL2 -> USE_SDL1/USE_SDL2)

And NOGRAPHIC changed to NOSDL.
When NOSDL is selected, SDL is disabled, but graphic and audio function
is usable by a limited function.
